## Checklist
<!-- To fill checkmarks add a "x" like so: [x] -->
- [ ] **Mandatory**: This isn't a duplicate of an
[existing pull request](https://github.com/Mahtwo/KHDownloader/pulls?q=is%3Apr%20) with the exact
same changes, including closed ones.
- [ ] This supersedes an open pull request. Specify which one and explain why your pull request is
preferable in the Summary section.
- [ ] **Mandatory**: You are human and certify this pull request works as intended and doesn't break
existing code. This doesn't stop you from using AI tools or making human mistakes (they happen!),
but AI hallucinated slop with no human verifications will earn a permanent ban.

## Closed issues (if applicable)
Include all issues closed by your pull request. [e.g. Closes #123, closes #456]

## Summary
What does your pull request.

## Tests (if applicable)
How did you tests your modifications.
